metadata.title: Topaz Image Upscale - AI Image Enhancer | Marble AI
metadata.description: Topaz Labs Image Upscale. AI image enhancement model that increases resolution and restores detail with high-fidelity upscaling and natural texture reconstruction. Image-to-image only.

hero.title: Topaz Image Upscale
hero.description: Topaz Labs' industry-leading AI image enhancement. Increase resolution and restore detail with high-fidelity upscaling and natural texture reconstruction.

introduce.title: About Topaz Image Upscale
introduce.label: Model Overview
introduce.description: Topaz Labs Image Upscale is an AI image enhancement model that increases resolution and restores detail with high-fidelity upscaling, natural texture reconstruction, and improved clarity.

items.title: High-Fidelity Upscaling
items.description: Increase image resolution while maintaining exceptional detail and sharpness.

items.title: Detail Restoration
items.description: Restore lost details in low-quality or compressed images.

items.title: Texture Reconstruction
items.description: Natural texture reconstruction for realistic and high-quality output.

items.title: Clarity Enhancement
items.description: Improved clarity across low-quality images with noise reduction.

features.title: Key Features
features.description: Discover what makes Topaz Image Upscale the industry standard.

items.description: Specialized for image enhancement and upscaling workflows.

items.description: Industry-leading quality trusted by professional photographers.

items.description: Support for various upscaling factors to meet different needs.

items.title: Noise Reduction
items.description: Intelligent noise reduction while preserving important details.

items.description: Full commercial rights for all enhanced images.

faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.description: Common questions about Topaz Image Upscale.

items.title: What is Topaz Image Upscale?
items.description: Topaz Image Upscale is Topaz Labs' AI image enhancement model that increases resolution and restores detail with high-fidelity upscaling.

items.title: What generation modes does it support?
items.description: Topaz Image Upscale supports Image To Image enhancement only, specializing in upscaling and detail restoration.

items.title: How much can it upscale?
items.description: It supports multiple scale factors, allowing you to upscale images to meet your specific resolution requirements.

items.title: Does it reduce noise?
items.description: Yes! Topaz Image Upscale includes intelligent noise reduction while preserving important image details.

items.title: Can I use it commercially?
items.description: Yes! All images enhanced with Topaz Image Upscale through Marble AI come with full commercial rights.

items.title: Is it good for old photos?
items.description: Yes! Topaz Image Upscale excels at restoring and enhancing old or low-quality archived images.

cta.title: Ready to Try Topaz Image Upscale?
cta.description: Experience industry-leading image enhancement. Restore detail and increase resolution.
